description: enqueue() with duplicate idempotency_key returned existing id silently; spec line 91 says "rejects duplicate".
fix: Added DuplicateIdempotencyKeyError; enqueue raises on duplicate. Exception carries existing_id for enqueue-or-fetch callers.

description: heartbeat_seen state from spec narrative (line 27) not implemented; claim() set last_heartbeat_at immediately, losing the "claimed-not-yet-heartbeated" distinction.
fix: Spec is internally inconsistent (line 27 lists 6 states; line 68 SQL DDL lists 5). Human adjudicated: keep 5-state DDL. claim() leaves last_heartbeat_at NULL; heartbeat() populates it. Test added.

description: Acceptance line 100 asks for concurrent-process tests; round 1 only had thread-based tests.
fix: Added subprocess-based test that spawns 4 worker processes and asserts exactly one wins. (Round 2 tightened it with a release barrier.)

description: Provider validation accepted ".", "..", and other traversal-like names, allowing escape from per-provider queue root.
fix: Tightened to regex ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$ + defense-in-depth Path.resolve() containment check. 11 parameterized rejection tests + 6 acceptance tests.

description: Multi-process claim test had no start barrier; could pass under serial execution without exercising real contention.
fix: Each subprocess opens QueueDB up-front, busy-waits on shared time.time() release timestamp 1s in the future, then calls claim() simultaneously.

description: PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL weakened durability against OS crash / power loss below the queue's contract.
fix: Removed the NORMAL override. SQLite default of FULL applies, which is the right durability floor for the canonical record of in-flight work. Added test_synchronous_not_downgraded_below_full asserting PRAGMA synchronous >= FULL.
note: Round 3 was the final allowed verification retry per workflow Step 7. Fix is mechanical (single line removed, plus a regression test) and is deemed safe to commit without re-verification.
